goal: Collect recent official diabetes medical-device regulatory, database, safety, and conference signals from openFDA, ClinicalTrials.gov, FDA CDRH pages, ADA, ATTD, and EASD.
hardConstraints: Create a separate taskbook; do not mix these sources into medical-diabetes-news.
Use official HTTP APIs or official listing pages only; do not use Chrome CDP.
Use only Node built-ins; do not add dependencies.
The requested window is capped at 30 days.
Worker must use dispatcher-computed days/startIso/endIso from TASK_INPUT and must not re-interpret relative dates.
Preserve official IDs, dates, URLs, source names, and titles in JSON.
Do not fabricate context; context must come from official metadata fields or official listing-page cells.
Do not turn undated conference landing-page links into dated news items; record them only in sourceStatus unless a clear item date is present.
Do not emit Markdown, HTML, or localized report text; rendering and language selection belong to diabetes-news-report-renderer.
acceptance: Do not write diabetes_device_regulatory_signals.md or diabetes_device_regulatory_signals.html.
Every result has source, signalType, title, date, url, company, deviceOrProduct, context, isDiabetesDeviceRelated, and id.
Every result date is parseable and within the requested day window.
Every result URL uses an accepted official FDA/openFDA/ClinicalTrials/ADA/ATTD/EASD domain.
No duplicate source/id pairs are emitted.
sourceFilter=all includes the Phase 2.5 official/conference sources: fda-cdrh, fda-device-safety, ada, attd, and easd.
forbidden: Do not scrape article detail pages.
Do not include general diabetes drug trials unless a device/CGM/pump/AID term is present in trial metadata.
Do not include general medical-device pages unless a diabetes-device product or technology term is present.
Do not use company names alone as inclusion criteria because they produce non-diabetes-device false positives.
Do not output Markdown or HTML.
Do not perform language localization in this collector.
context: Phase 2 plus Phase 2.5 from source-plan.md. This task collects regulatory/database/official safety/conference signals as structured JSON only.
